  Well-executed removal of the dispatch package with corresponding integration of push into seal(). The push-failure test in scriptorium-core.test.ts is notably strong — it verifies error message, local state integrity, and draft survival. Minor duplication of the push+error block in two seal paths in scriptorium-core.ts, but acceptable given the linear flow. Documentation updates are comprehensive and consistent with neighboring specs.
